hero.title: Kulamuliridwa ndi malo osungiramo zinthu
hero.lead: IATF yikupangiska kuti ŵanthu wose ŵapulikiskenge, kuŵazga makora, na kunozgekera makora.
support: Pa peji ili pakulongosoreka ivyo vikukhumbikwa, umo malo ghakusungiramo vinthu ghakugwilira ntchito, ndiposo udindo uwo munthu wakuŵa nawo para wazomera kugwiliskira ntchito vinthu ivi.

header.title: Kugwirizana kwa ntchito, umwini, kupereka chilolezo

cards.title: Kugwira Ntchito Mwakwenelera
paragraphs: IATF yikupokelera ntchito izo zikovwira kuti vinthu viŵe vyambura kusuzga kupulikiska kweniso izo zili na chandulo ku ŵanthu.
Pulojekiti iyenera kukhala yothandiza kwambiri kuposa njira imodzi yogwirira ntchito ndipo iyenera kugwira ntchito ngati malo osungira anthu.

IATF yikugwiliskira nchito webusayiti kuti yiŵe yakufikapo. [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Ivyo ŵanthu awo ŵakugwiliskira nchito wovwiri uwu ŵakukumana navyo vikulongoraso ivyo vikuŵawovwira nadi.

cards.title: Kuvomerezeka kwa polojekiti
paragraphs: Pempho lingazomerezgeka usange pakuliwona ŵawona kuti:
items: likugwira ntchito pa vinthu ivyo vikukhumbikwa nadi.
malo agha ghakaŵa ghakukwana kuti ghangatumphuskika
ntchitoyi ikugwirizana ndi ntchito ya IATF
pali nthowa yakupulikikwa yakufikira ku malo ghakusungirako panji kumalizgira

cards.title: Umwini wa malo osungiramo zinthu
paragraphs: Mapulojekiti ghakuzomerezgeka ghakulembeka na gulu la IATF GitHub.
Ivi vikovwira kuti nyumba yiliyose yiŵe yakukhora, nanga ni para awo ŵakuyinyamura ŵangasintha.

cards.title: Kupeleka Malayisensi
paragraphs: Mapulojekiti a IATF amagwiritsa ntchito chilolezo cha copyleft pokhapokha ngati polojekitiyo ikunena zina:

maintainer.title: Injiniya uyo wali na udindo panji uyo wakunozga vinthu
paragraphs: Ntchito yiliyose iyo yapokelereka yikwenera kuŵa na munthu wakwendeska panji uyo wakunozga.
items: kuwunikira kapena kusamalira nkhani ndi kukoka zopempha
lembani ivyo mukwenera kusankha pa nkhani ya tekinoloje
maintainer.footnote: Ichi ndi udindo wa malo osungiramo zinthu. Ulamuliro wa mabungwe umakhalabe ndi IATF. Udindo pano ndi woyang'anira malo osungira zinthu, chitsogozo chaukadaulo, ndi mgwirizano wapagulu  osati kupereka kwapadera kopanda malire, kuphatikiza kwachikhalidwe, kapena kudzipereka kwa ntchito kunja kwa mapu oyendera pagulu.

publicDevelopment.title: Kukula kwa boma
paragraphs: Vinthu vyose ivyo vikulembeka na IATF vikuŵa pa malo apo ŵanthu wose ŵakuviwona.
publicDevelopment.footnote: Fundo zakuzirwa zakukhwaskana na pulogiramu iyi zikwenera kuŵa mu ma Inbox pera yayi.

paragraphs: IATF imagwira ntchito pagulu mwachisawawa. Zopempha zomwe zikulowa mu IAT F kudzera pa webusayiti, imelo, Discord, GitHub, kapena njira zina za I AT F zitha kukhala zolembera zofunsira pagulu.
IATF yingayowoya mwakudumura, kung'anamura, panji kung'anamulira ivyo mwapempha pambere mundasindikizge.
Mabuku gha ivyo ŵanthu ŵakukhumba ghangasungika mu gulu la IATF GitHub, pa webusayiti iyi, panji pa vyose viŵiri.

Pambere ŵandalembeke, IATF yikuwuskamo vinthu vyambura kukhumbikwa vyakukhwaskana na awo ŵakugwiliskira ntchito vinthu ivi, maadiresi gha ŵanthu, ndiposo ivyo vikovwira kumanya munthu waliyose uyo wagwiliskira nchito vinthu ivi.

Discord yikugwiliskirika nchito pa vinthu vyambura kuzomerezgeka. IATF yikusunga yayi mauthenga gha Discord mwakupambana, ndipo kusungika kwa mauthenga kukulongozgeka na Discord. Vyakusankha ivyo vyapangika mu Discord vikwenera kusindikizgika pa GitHub panji pa peji la projekiti.

Kufunafuna ma rekodi sikugwiranso ntchito pa makina osakira pomwe kuli koyenera. Public zikutanthauza kuwunikiridwa ndi kuyankha. Sichikutanthauza kukhathamiritsa kwa kupezeka kudzera pakufufuza mayina.

IATF yingasintha panji kuwuskapo ma rekodi agho ghali pa malo agho yikusunga, kweni yingayowoyapo yayi kuti ghawuskikengeso mu vinthu vyaŵene, ma notices, forks, screenshots, search engines, Discord, panji vinthu vinyake.
Usange uthenga ukwenera kulutilira kuŵa wapadera, ungawutumizganga yayi mu nthowa iyo IATF yikugwiliskira ntchito.

chair.lead: Uyo wakulongozga IATF wali na udindo wa kulongozga gulu lose la maofesi gha maofesi agha.

duties.title: Ivyo mpando ukucita
items: Ikusunga zilolezo za mwini pa gulu la IATF GitHub
Kuvomerezeka kwa polojekiti ndi zosankha zosungira zinthu zakale
Amagwira ntchito ngati malo oyankhulirana ndi anthu ku IATF
duties.footnote: Wapampando wa IATF sakhala ndi udindo wogwira ntchito zapadera, ntchito yolipiridwa, kapena mapangano a ntchito, ndipo samayang'anira zosankha za oyang'anira nkhokwe zaukadaulo.

election.title: Kusankha kwa cilimika cilicose
paragraphs: Wupu uwu ukusankhika kamoza pa cilimika, ndipo ukucitika mu masabata ghaŵiri ghakwambilira gha Disembala.
Munthu uyo wali na mavoti ghanandi ndiyo wakuwina ndipo para pali mavoti ghakukwana mu sabata yachitatu ya mwezi wa Disembala, ŵanthu wose awo ŵakhalapo nawo pa IATF ndiwo ŵakuvota.
Chisankho ichi chikuchitika pa GitHub Discussion mu IATF governance repository, ntheura ma candidates, voti, na ivyo vyachitika vyose vili pa public record.

continuity.title: Kukhazikika
paragraphs: Ngati palibe chisankho chomwe chikuchitika mchaka china, wapampando wapano akupitilizabe kugwira ntchito mpaka chisankho chotsatira. Ichi ndi kupitilira kosatha, osati nthawi yachifundo  Mtunduwu wapangidwa kuti bungwe likhale lokhazikika pomwe ntchito ili yochepa, osati kukakamiza kusintha komwe palibe amene ali wokonzeka.
Wupu wakulongozga ungafumapo pa udindo pa nyengo yiliyose.

chair.footnote: Wupu wakulongozga ukalembeka mu chaka cha 2026 kuti ulongosore umo wupu ukwendeskera vinthu.

states.title: Zochitika za polojekiti
paragraphs: Mapulojekiti amagwiritsa ntchito zigawo zochepa za boma:
states.footnote: Vinthu ivi vikovwira kuti mabuku gha mdauko ghaŵe ghapusu kuŵazga.

reassignment.title: Kugaŵiraso na kusunga
paragraphs: Para munthu uyo wakugwira ntchito ya kunozga vinthu wafumapo panji waleka kugwira ntchito, wupu wa IATF ungamupa mulimo unyake, kulekeska mulimo wake, panji kuwulekeska.
Ntchito yingaŵikikaso ku malo ghakusungirako vinthu vyakale para ivyo vikakhumbikwanga vyamara, para ntchito ya kunozga yamara, panji usange ntchakwenelera yayi kulutilira kugwira ntchito.
reassignment.footnote: Vinthu ivyo vili kusungika vikulutilira kuwonekera ku ŵanthu wose, pekha para pali vifukwa vyakupulikikwa vyakuchitira nthena.

items: kusamalira kwa nyengo yaitali kwa polojekiti iliyonse
boundaries.footnote: IATF ni malo ghakusungirako vinthu vya ŵanthu wose, ni gulu la ŵanthu bweka yayi.
